TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Cou tatangahan: Cou saka pitu a binacadan kakaliman: Cou saka pitu a binacadan a Alisan nu buyu'an a kakenis muenenay nu Alisan akenis a buyu', i tebanay i talakaway a buyu' nu Taywan, izaw ku lisin nu heni tu kapahay a ci salangec tu habay ŚįŹÁĪ≥śĒ∂Á©ęÁ•≠ŚÖł(homeyaya)a mikukay tu kakasan, atu palimulak tu talumaay nu malpacaway a lisin.ŤąáŚáĪśóčÁ•≠(mayasvi) nilaculan: Cou saka pitu a binacadan a Alisan nu buyu'an a kakenis muenenay nu Alisan akenis a buyu', i tebanay i talakaway a buyu' nu Taywan, izaw ku lisin nu heni tu kapahay a ci salangec tu habay ŚįŹÁĪ≥śĒ∂Á©ęÁ•≠ŚÖł(homeyaya)a mikukay tu kakasan, atu palimulak tu talumaay nu malpacaway a lisin.ŤąáŚáĪśóčÁ•≠(mayasvi) (u kamu nu Hulam: ","homeyaya "Ťąá"mayasvi " mayasvi , .) 1:nilaculan atu kakanan nu Cou nu tuas anika uzip atu nupakalisuway nika uzip izaw ku ni "kalukan, miadup, mibuting atu misupet tu canacana" nu tademaw, maluk tu hapay tipus, uzupa', tali, unian kukakanan nu Cou a binacadan. sakakapah asu'ay a kakanan sakakapah tu uzip, makani miadup, nikalaan tu kyumah, ngabul, sizi a titian cunus han tu nu ayamam atu buting a titi, sapicunus tu sakapah tu nu uzip, Cou singanga tu nu aukay a henay. 2:zikuz:Cou u paylimayay nu tatama atu tatayna u tatama nu buculay ku tupel pabanuhan tu nu ayamay, u tungusay u iyung nu heni, nu zikuz nu heni, u sapisanga tu zikuz u tatama uyza u bukul tatayna u nu kupa,atu nu nitemunan ku zikuz nuheni, u kulit uyza u sumanahay, sanglacay, lumeni'ay, sumilaway a kulitan, mangaleb nu tatama silusi u sumanahay yamin a kulit. 3:Cou:matineng misanga' tu nalimaan milutlut tu bukal, hina nikaalaan tu aadupan ya bukal niza sapisanga' tu zikuz, ayaw namilutlut mipudac, minayat tya bukul, paacak, mikiskis tu banuh. 4:unisanga'an nu Cou a luma ' namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan
S.PHON: ¶ou tataŇčańßan: ¶ou saka pitu a bina ¶adan kakar~…ĺiman: ¶ou saka pitu a bina ¶adan a ar~…ĺisan nu buju Ē~ °an a kak…ônis mu…ôn…ônaj nu ar~…ĺisan ak…ônis a buju Ē~ °, i t…ôbanaj i tar~…ĺakawaj a buju Ē~ ° nu tajwan, izaw ku r~…ĺisin nu ńß…ôni tu kapańßaj a ¶i sar~…ĺaŇč…ô ¶ tu ńßabaj ******(ńßom…ôaja)a mikukaj tu kakasan, atu par~…ĺimur~…ĺak tu tar~…ĺumaaj nu mar~…ĺpa ¶awaj a r~…ĺisin.****(majas*i) nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan: ¶ou saka pitu a bina ¶adan a ar~…ĺisan nu buju Ē~ °an a kak…ônis mu…ôn…ônaj nu ar~…ĺisan ak…ônis a buju Ē~ °, i t…ôbanaj i tar~…ĺakawaj a buju Ē~ ° nu tajwan, izaw ku r~…ĺisin nu ńß…ôni tu kapańßaj a ¶i sar~…ĺaŇč…ô ¶ tu ńßabaj ******(ńßom…ôaja)a mikukaj tu kakasan, atu par~…ĺimur~…ĺak tu tar~…ĺumaaj nu mar~…ĺpa ¶awaj a r~…ĺisin.****(majas*i) (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: ","ńßom…ôaja "*"majas*i " majas*i , .) *:nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan atu kakanan nu ¶ou nu tuas anika uzip atu nupakar~…ĺisuwaj nika uzip izaw ku ni "kar~…ĺukan, miadup, mibutiŇč atu misup…ôt tu ¶ana ¶ana" nu tad…ômaw, mar~…ĺuk tu ńßapaj tipus, uzupa Ē~ °, tar~…ĺi, unian kukakanan nu ¶ou a bina ¶adan. sakakapańß asu Ē~ °aj a kakanan sakakapańß tu uzip, makani miadup, nikar~…ĺaan tu kjumańß, Ňčabur~…ĺ, sizi a titian ¶unus ńßan tu nu ajamam atu butiŇč a titi, sapi ¶unus tu sakapańß tu nu uzip, ¶ou siŇčaŇča tu nu aukaj a ńß…ônaj. *:zikuz: ¶ou u pajr~…ĺimajaj nu tatama atu tatajna u tatama nu bu ¶ur~…ĺaj ku tup…ôr~…ĺ pabanuńßan tu nu ajamaj, u tuŇčusaj u ijuŇč nu ńß…ôni, nu zikuz nu ńß…ôni, u sapisaŇča tu zikuz u tatama ujza u bukur~…ĺ tatajna u nu kupa,atu nu nit…ômunan ku zikuz nuńß…ôni, u kur~…ĺit ujza u sumanańßaj, saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj, r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj, sumir~…ĺawaj a kur~…ĺitan, maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb nu tatama sir~…ĺusi u sumanańßaj jamin a kur~…ĺit. *: ¶ou:matin…ôŇč misaŇča Ē~ ° tu nar~…ĺimaan mir~…ĺutr~…ĺut tu bukar~…ĺ, ńßina nikaar~…ĺaan tu aadupan ja bukar~…ĺ niza sapisaŇča Ē~ ° tu zikuz, ajaw namir~…ĺutr~…ĺut mipuda ¶, minajat tja bukur~…ĺ, paa ¶ak, mikiskis tu banuńß. *:unisaŇča Ē~ °an nu ¶ou a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: Cou tatangahan: Cou saka pitu a binacadan kakaliman: Cou saka pitu a binacadan a Alisan nu buyu'an a kakenis muenenay nu Alisan akenis a buyu', i tebanay i talakaway a buyu' nu Taywan, izaw ku lisin nu heni tu kapahay a ci salangec tu habay ŚįŹÁĪ≥śĒ∂Á©ęÁ•≠ŚÖł(homeyaya)a mikukay tu kakasan, atu palimulak tu talumaay nu malpacaway a lisin.ŤąáŚáĪśóčÁ•≠(mayasvi) nilaculan: Cou saka pitu a binacadan a Alisan nu buyu'an a kakenis muenenay nu Alisan akenis a buyu', i tebanay i talakaway a buyu' nu Taywan, izaw ku lisin nu heni tu kapahay a ci salangec tu habay ŚįŹÁĪ≥śĒ∂Á©ęÁ•≠ŚÖł(homeyaya)a mikukay tu kakasan, atu palimulak tu talumaay nu malpacaway a lisin.ŤąáŚáĪśóčÁ•≠(mayasvi) (u kamu nu Hulam: ","homeyaya "Ťąá"mayasvi " mayasvi , .) 1:nilaculan atu kakanan nu Cou nu tuas anika uzip atu nupakalisuway nika uzip izaw ku ni "kalukan, miadup, mibuting atu misupet tu canacana" nu tademaw, maluk tu hapay tipus, uzupa', tali, unian kukakanan nu Cou a binacadan. sakakapah asu'ay a kakanan sakakapah tu uzip, makani miadup, nikalaan tu kyumah, ngabul, sizi a titian cunus han tu nu ayamam atu buting a titi, sapicunus tu sakapah tu nu uzip, Cou singanga tu nu aukay a henay. 2:zikuz:Cou u paylimayay nu tatama atu tatayna u tatama nu buculay ku tupel pabanuhan tu nu ayamay, u tungusay u iyung nu heni, nu zikuz nu heni, u sapisanga tu zikuz u tatama uyza u bukul tatayna u nu kupa,atu nu nitemunan ku zikuz nuheni, u kulit uyza u sumanahay, sanglacay, lumeni'ay, sumilaway a kulitan, mangaleb nu tatama silusi u sumanahay yamin a kulit. 3:Cou:matineng misanga' tu nalimaan milutlut tu bukal, hina nikaalaan tu aadupan ya bukal niza sapisanga' tu zikuz, ayaw namilutlut mipudac, minayat tya bukul, paacak, mikiskis tu banuh. 4:unisanga'an nu Cou a luma ' namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan
S.PHON: ¶ou tataŇčańßan: ¶ou saka pitu a bina ¶adan kakar~…ĺiman: ¶ou saka pitu a bina ¶adan a ar~…ĺisan nu buju Ē~ °an a kak…ônis mu…ôn…ônaj nu ar~…ĺisan ak…ônis a buju Ē~ °, i t…ôbanaj i tar~…ĺakawaj a buju Ē~ ° nu tajwan, izaw ku r~…ĺisin nu ńß…ôni tu kapańßaj a ¶i sar~…ĺaŇč…ô ¶ tu ńßabaj ******(ńßom…ôaja)a mikukaj tu kakasan, atu par~…ĺimur~…ĺak tu tar~…ĺumaaj nu mar~…ĺpa ¶awaj a r~…ĺisin.****(majas*i) nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan: ¶ou saka pitu a bina ¶adan a ar~…ĺisan nu buju Ē~ °an a kak…ônis mu…ôn…ônaj nu ar~…ĺisan ak…ônis a buju Ē~ °, i t…ôbanaj i tar~…ĺakawaj a buju Ē~ ° nu tajwan, izaw ku r~…ĺisin nu ńß…ôni tu kapańßaj a ¶i sar~…ĺaŇč…ô ¶ tu ńßabaj ******(ńßom…ôaja)a mikukaj tu kakasan, atu par~…ĺimur~…ĺak tu tar~…ĺumaaj nu mar~…ĺpa ¶awaj a r~…ĺisin.****(majas*i) (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: ","ńßom…ôaja "*"majas*i " majas*i , .) *:nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan atu kakanan nu ¶ou nu tuas anika uzip atu nupakar~…ĺisuwaj nika uzip izaw ku ni "kar~…ĺukan, miadup, mibutiŇč atu misup…ôt tu ¶ana ¶ana" nu tad…ômaw, mar~…ĺuk tu ńßapaj tipus, uzupa Ē~ °, tar~…ĺi, unian kukakanan nu ¶ou a bina ¶adan. sakakapańß asu Ē~ °aj a kakanan sakakapańß tu uzip, makani miadup, nikar~…ĺaan tu kjumańß, Ňčabur~…ĺ, sizi a titian ¶unus ńßan tu nu ajamam atu butiŇč a titi, sapi ¶unus tu sakapańß tu nu uzip, ¶ou siŇčaŇča tu nu aukaj a ńß…ônaj. *:zikuz: ¶ou u pajr~…ĺimajaj nu tatama atu tatajna u tatama nu bu ¶ur~…ĺaj ku tup…ôr~…ĺ pabanuńßan tu nu ajamaj, u tuŇčusaj u ijuŇč nu ńß…ôni, nu zikuz nu ńß…ôni, u sapisaŇča tu zikuz u tatama ujza u bukur~…ĺ tatajna u nu kupa,atu nu nit…ômunan ku zikuz nuńß…ôni, u kur~…ĺit ujza u sumanańßaj, saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj, r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj, sumir~…ĺawaj a kur~…ĺitan, maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb nu tatama sir~…ĺusi u sumanańßaj jamin a kur~…ĺit. *: ¶ou:matin…ôŇč misaŇča Ē~ ° tu nar~…ĺimaan mir~…ĺutr~…ĺut tu bukar~…ĺ, ńßina nikaar~…ĺaan tu aadupan ja bukar~…ĺ niza sapisaŇča Ē~ ° tu zikuz, ajaw namir~…ĺutr~…ĺut mipuda ¶, minajat tja bukur~…ĺ, paa ¶ak, mikiskis tu banuńß. *:unisaŇča Ē~ °an nu ¶ou a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan
